headline: Youth Parliament initiative abandoned after 2 sessions with 0 legislative impact
context: The Youth Parliament pilot programme launched in 2023 was discontinued after two sessions, having produced zero policy recommendations that were forwarded to the actual Parliament.

cards.big: Youth Parliament scrapped after 2 sessions — produced zero recommendations that reached actual MPs
cards.sub: Programme designed to engage young Malaysians treated as expendable photo opportunity

cards.big: No formal mechanism existed to transmit Youth Parliament recommendations to Dewan Rakyat
cards.sub: Programme was structurally disconnected from actual legislative process by design

cards.big: RM3.2 million spent on venue, logistics, and media for 2 ceremonial sessions
cards.sub: Public funds used for symbolic exercise with zero governance outcome

cards.big: Scotland's Youth Parliament has formal right to present resolutions to Scottish Parliament
cards.sub: Effective youth engagement requires structural connection to real decision-making

cards.big: A youth parliament with no connection to real parliament teaches young people that their voice doesn't matter
Should Youth Parliament resolutions be formally tabled in Dewan Rakyat for government response?
